{{Quote|Moss Deevers and Twingo hold the current lead.|[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]|<ref name="Vector Prime" />}}
'''Moss Deevers''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who paired with [[Twingo]]. The two were known for their wild boasts. They set the record for running the [[Lando's Folly]] course.<ref name="Vector Prime" />
